{{Relic Infobox|Preserved Fog|2}}{{Small Card Infobox|Folly|2}}
{{R|Preserved Fog||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relic}}. 

== Sources ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}}, '''Preserved Fog''' can be offered by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Preserved Fog''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Distinguished Cape||2}} and {{R|Sere Talon||2}}, only 1 of the 3 can be offered by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.
== Interactions ==

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**Preserved Fog changes from BETA branch were moved to the main version of the game.
* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Cards removed decreased from 5 -> 3.
** Folly curse is now Ethereal.

* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Preserved Fog to the game.
